name: Little Hotelier Small Property Management API
what_it_does: Little Hotelier all-in-one property management REST API for bed and breakfasts, small hotels, guesthouses, and boutique inns to manage reservations, channel distribution, front desk operations, and direct bookings. Enables AI agents to manage reservation creation and modification for small property booking automation, handle channel manager synchronization for OTA availability and rate distribution automation, access direct booking engine management for small property website booking automation, retrieve front desk check-in and check-out workflow for property operations automation, manage housekeeping task assignment for small property room management automation, handle invoice and payment management for small property financial automation, access guest communication and confirmation for small property guest experience automation, retrieve reporting and occupancy analytics for small property performance automation, manage room and rate configuration for small property setup automation, and integrate Little Hotelier with SiteMinder's broader channel management ecosystem for end-to-end small property distribution management.
use_cases: Managing B&B reservations from small property automation agents
Syncing OTA availability from channel distribution automation agents
Processing check-ins from front desk operations automation agents
Reporting occupancy from property analytics automation agents
not_for: Mid-size hotels with 50+ rooms needing full PMS features (use SiteMinder with separate PMS)
Vacation rental and holiday letting platforms (use Guesty or Hostfully)
Hostel and dorm bed management (use Hostelworld or Beds24)
best_when: A bed and breakfast, guesthouse, small hotel, or boutique inn with under 50 rooms wanting AI agents to automate reservation management, OTA channel synchronization, front desk operations, and guest communications within Little Hotelier's all-in-one small property platform.
avoid_when: SITEMINDER PARENT COMPANY API DEPENDENCY: Little Hotelier is a SiteMinder product; API access and roadmap decisions are made within SiteMinder's product portfolio priorities; evaluate whether direct SiteMinder API or Little Hotelier API is the appropriate integration point for larger property management automation requirements. SMALL PROPERTY GDPR FOR EUROPEAN B&BS: Automated guest data collection via Little Hotelier for European guesthouses and B&Bs must comply with GDPR; small property operators often lack GDPR expertise; automated guest profile creation and data retention in Little Hotelier must implement GDPR consent and retention policies appropriate for the property's jurisdiction. OTA PARITY RATE COMPLIANCE IN CHANNEL MANAGER: Automated rate management via Little Hotelier channel manager must respect OTA parity clauses in Booking.com, Expedia, and Airbnb agreements; automated rate undercutting on direct booking channel below OTA rates violates parity agreements and can result in OTA rate parity enforcement actions including listing removal.

auth.notes: Little Hotelier uses OAuth 2.0 via SiteMinder's API platform. REST API with JSON. Sydney, Australia HQ (SiteMinder, ASX: SDR). Little Hotelier is a SiteMinder product for small properties. SiteMinder acquired Little Hotelier in 2015. SiteMinder is the market-leading hotel channel manager connecting to 450+ OTA and GDS channels. Little Hotelier is the all-in-one solution specifically for B&Bs, guesthouses, and small inns. GDPR. PCI-DSS. Competes with Cloudbeds, Lodgify, and Beds24 for small property management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription for small properties
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription starting at small property tier; channel manager and booking engine included; pricing based on room count
pricing.notes: Sydney AU. SiteMinder (ASX: SDR). Monthly subscription. Room-count pricing. Channel manager included. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; channel and reservation queries throttled; webhooks for booking and availability events

known_agent_gotchas: SITEMINDER vs LITTLE HOTELIER API SURFACE DISTINCTION: Little Hotelier API is accessed through SiteMinder's developer platform; some SiteMinder API capabilities are available to all channel manager customers while Little Hotelier-specific PMS functionality is restricted to Little Hotelier subscribers; verify which API endpoints are in scope for Little Hotelier subscription vs SiteMinder-only capabilities before automated workflow design

CHANNEL MANAGER AVAILABILITY SYNC TWO-WAY CONSISTENCY: Little Hotelier channel manager syncs availability to OTAs and receives bookings from OTAs; automated booking injection and availability management must handle two-way sync conflicts; automated direct booking that doesn't trigger immediate channel availability update creates overbooking window during sync lag

SMALL PROPERTY OPERATOR TECHNICAL SOPHISTICATION: Little Hotelier's target customer is small B&B and guesthouse operators with limited technical sophistication; automated workflow failures that expose API error codes to property operators without user-friendly error translation will create support escalation; automated integrations should surface operational guidance rather than raw API errors

OTA RATE PARITY ENFORCEMENT RISK FOR DIRECT BOOKING DISCOUNTS: Automated rate management that sets direct booking prices below Booking.com or Expedia rates violates parity agreements common in OTA contracts; automated direct booking engine rate optimization must respect OTA rate parity floors; automated rate undercut detection should be implemented before automated direct booking discount deployment

PAYMENT CARD TOKENIZATION FOR CARD GUARANTEE: Little Hotelier uses PCI-DSS compliant payment tokenization for reservation card guarantees; automated workflows accessing reservation payment data receive tokens, not raw card numbers; automated no-show charge processing must use SiteMinder Payments or integrated payment gateway token charge workflow, not raw card processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Small property PMS. PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. AU/EU/US. Guest reservation, payment token, and small property operations data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Small property PMS. PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. AU/EU/US. Guest, reservation, and payment data.
